Subject: OOE-OPUC Briefs RE: Dec 14 RTO West proposals
Message:
Attached are overviews of the Dec. 14 RTO West proposals for Market
Monitoring, Pricing, Congestion Management, and Planning  by the Oregon Office
of Energy and the Staff of the Oregon Public Utility Commission.  Also
attached is a draft of principles and a cover memo to the Commission.
